nasb.text: While He had not yet made the earth and the fields, Nor the first dust of the world.

esv.text: before he had made the earth with its fields, or the first of the dust of the world.

cnv.text: 那時，耶和華還沒有造大地和田野， 也沒有造地上的泥土。

ccb.text: 那时耶和华还没有造大地和原野， 还没有造一粒尘土。

csbs.text: 那时耶和华还没有造大地、田野， 也没有造世上最初的尘土。
